subject: A solitary leafless tree bearing a single luminous red fruit, growing alone in a dark, barren expanse
description: A gnarled, leafless dark tree stands alone at the center of the composition, its bare branches twisting outward against an inky black background. Near the lower trunk, a single fruit glows a hot, blood-red, casting a soft crimson light onto the tree's bark and the cracked, ashen ground at its base. The surrounding landscape is featureless dark void, suggesting an underworld or barren afterlife. The image is sparse, symmetrical, and ominous — the glowing fruit is the sole point of color and the clear focal point.
foreground: leafless dark tree with a single glowing red fruit; cracked barren ground
background: deep black void, no horizon or sky details
